title: Kinds NoFireOverlay
description: A lightweight client side mod that removes the obstructive first person fire overlay while you’re burning, keeping your view clear.
body:
Kind’s NoFireOverlay

---

--- ## This is a Discontinued Mod ## Smooth & Clear Gameplay Kind’s NoFireOverlay is a client-side Fabric mod that removes the distracting fire overlay when burning in Minecraft. It provides a clear view while taking damage from fire, lava, or flaming enemies, improving visibility and gameplay awareness during PvP or survival scenarios. ## Why Use This Mod? The fire overlay can block your vision and slow your reaction time. This mod helps by: - Removing fire overlay entirely - Maintaining full visibility while on fire - Improving response and reaction during combat or exploration - Keeping PvP fights clear and fair ---

Visual Comparison

| With Mod | Without Mod | |----------|------------| | | |
